title: LuckSMPPlus
description: Lightweight Minecraft plugin adding luck‑based items, events, and mechanics to spice up your SMP gameplay.
body:
LuckSMPPlus adds a fresh twist to Minecraft survival by introducing luck‑driven gameplay mechanics — from unique items like the Luck Tome to surprise event triggers that keep every session unpredictable. Designed for Paper/Spigot, it’s lightweight, configurable, and perfect for SMPs that want something extra without overcomplicating their plugin stack.

Key Features

🎲 Luck Tome – a custom item with special abilities, powered by CustomModelData (optional resource pack support)

🧮 Configurable luck values influencing drops, loot tables, and events

🛠 Compatible with Paper 1.20+ (build against 1.20.4 API; tested on 1.21.x)

📂 Clean, production‑ready JAR with MIT License

⚡ Optimized for minimal performance impact on live servers
